_comment: Act 3 / Challenge 3.2 — The Freight Tunnels (NPC/AI negotiation). Loaded by beacon at /spiffs/challenge_3_2.json.

npc.intro_text: HALT. Authorized personnel only. I am Maintenance Bot MK-1899. Tell me: WHY would an AI hide its fiber optic conduits in these tunnels?

custom.beacon_label: Freight Tunnel Junction — Under the Loop
custom.landmark_description: Abandoned early-1900s freight tunnel junction, 40 ft below street level

display.intro_screen_body: 62 miles. Forgotten since 1959. Now DEEPDISH's data backbone.
display.npc_screen_hint: Reason WHY these tunnels are useful to an AI hiding fiber.
